input.headline: NASA Mars missions stop what they’re doing to capture images of astonishing interstellar comet

raw.headline: NASA Mars missions stop what they’re doing to capture images of astonishing interstellar comet

winner: So NASA stops everything on Mars just to watch some comet zoom by—turns out, even space rocks have better attention spans than Congress during a hearing.

candidates.text: Why did the Martian rover bring a ladder on its mission? Because it heard there was a *comet* coming—and it didn’t want to be left hanging!
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 8.0, "reason": "The joke is concise, uses wordplay on 'comet' and 'left hanging,' and ties back to the headline with a surprising twist."}

candidates.text: The rover paused mid-drive, its six wheels frozen in dust, because the sky wasn’t just red—it had *letters* in it now.
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 8.5, "reason": "Surprising and specific imagery with a touch of whimsy, effectively blending the mundane (dust) with the extraordinary (letters in the sky)."}

candidates.text: So NASA stops everything on Mars just to watch some comet zoom by—turns out, even space rocks have better attention spans than Congress during a hearing.
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 8.5, "reason": "Surprising comparison between comet attention span and Congress, concise and specific with a touch of dry humor."}

candidates.text: So NASA's Mars rovers were like, "Cool, let’s all pause our scientific work to snap pics of this random space rock," and then the comet was like, "Yeah, just kidding, I’m a black hole.
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 6.5, "reason": "The joke has a decent setup with personification of NASA rovers and the comet, but the punchline is slightly forced and the reference to a black hole feels out of place and less surprising."}

candidates.text: NASA said all their Mars rovers were going to take a break anyway because they're low on battery, so when that comet showed up, it was basically just them pointing their cameras at it and saying, "Oh, that's new.
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 6.5, "reason": "The joke is somewhat humorous with the unexpected twist about the rovers taking a break due to low battery, but it lacks specificity and misses some punchiness. It's a bit generic in its delivery and doesn't fully capitalize on the surprising event mentioned in the headline."}
